Command.Name: Original File
Command.Title: How to get an original (unmodified) GTA V file.
Command.Description:
If you need an **original GTA V file** (for example `visualsettings.dat`, `update.rpf`, etc.), you usually **already have it on your computer**.
When modding LSPDFR, you normally edit files inside your **mods folder**. This folder is just a **copy of the real game files**, allowing you to modify them safely without touching the originals.
That means the **original, unmodified version** of the file still exists **outside the mods folder** in your main GTA V directory.
Instead of downloading files from others, simply copy the original file from the base game back into your mods folder.

Field.Name: How to find the original file
Field.Value:
1. Go to your **GTAV installation folder**. 2. Navigate to the **same path** as the file inside your `mods` folder. 3. Find the file **outside the `mods` folder**. 4. Copy it and paste it into the same location **inside the `mods` folder**.
Example: `GTAV\update\update.rpf` → original file `GTAV\mods\update\update.rpf` → modded copy
